commit_scope: Add a Form-native meaning-translation receipt and harden form.bml if diagnostics against raw substring crashes

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/line-grammar.fk form-stdlib/bmf-core.fk form-stdlib/bmf-grammar.fk form-stdlib/bml.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/tests/source-compiler-multi-dialect-band.fk
cd form && malformed multi-line form.bml if probe exits 1 with fatal_message=source-compile: form.bml if missing 'then': if x and fatal_kind=source_compile_failure
local_validation.notes: The meaning-translation receipt proves a guarantee only when declared compiler surfaces, bidirectional source maps, matching semantic root, five core axioms, honest encoder witness, computed/reciprocal/holdout/no-collapse equivalence witness, and undefined-policy=refuse all hold. The proof band returns 1111111 across Go/Rust/TypeScript. The negative source-compiler probe no longer fails with substring bounds; it reports a source_compile_failure with the bad BML line and writes a trace.

ci_validation.notes: PR CI has not run yet for this branch.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: No public route behavior changes are expected from this stdlib/source-compiler/doc slice; deploy proof should confirm public web/API canaries remain healthy after merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local focused validation passed; PR CI and deploy proof remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form can now express a meaning-preserving software translation as a kernel-readable receipt that either proves the declared semantic contract or returns a named refusal reason. Malformed multi-line form.bml if expressions now fail with a source compiler fatal diagnostic instead of a raw substring bounds panic.
test_flows: Run the receipt band and verify Go/Rust/TypeScript agree on 1111111.
Compile a malformed multi-line form.bml if and verify fatal_kind=source_compile_failure with source line context.
Read universal-translator.form Part 5.1 and verify it names the executable receipt contract.
